[[af:Waterperd (astrologie)]][[cdo:Ìng-ngū]][[de:Wasser-Pferd]][[fr:Cheval d'eau]][[hak:Ngìm-ńg]][[ja:壬午]][[ko:임오]][[nds:Water-Peerd]][[vi:Nhâm Ngọ]][[za:Nyaemzngux]][[zh-min-nan:Jîm-ngó͘]][[zh-yue:壬午]][[zh:壬午]]

'''Yang Water Horse also known as 壬午''' (mizu no euma, jinsui no uma, jingo) is one of the [[Sexagenary cycle]].

It is the 19th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is [[Yin Metal Snake]] and the following combination is [[Yin Water Goat]]. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|Yin-Yang Five Elements]], the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ [[Mizunoe (壬)]] represents yang [[Water (wuxing)|Water (水)]], while the [[Earthly Branches|Twelve Earthly Branches]]’ [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] represents yang [[Fire (wuxing)|Fire (火)]], and they interact by [[Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)]] (Water overcomes Fire).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Water Horse (壬午)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): rénwǔ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jam4 ng5
** Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Mizunoe-uma
***Kunyomi 2: Jinsui-no-uma
***Onyomi 1: jin go
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): imo (임오)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Nhâm Ngọ

==Years of Yang Water Horse==
A [[Common Era]] year that leaves a remainder of 22 when divided by 60 is a [[Year]] of Ren-Go.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of Ren-Go'''
|-
! [[1st millennium|1st Millennium]] !! [[2nd millennium|2nd Millennium]] !! [[3rd millennium|3rd Millennium]]
|-
|
* [[AD 22|22 AD]]
* [[AD 82|82 AD]]
* [[AD 142|142 AD]]
* [[202|202 AD]]
* [[262|262 AD]]
* [[322|322 AD]]
* [[382|382 AD]]
* [[AD 442|442 AD]]
* [[AD 502|502 AD]]
* [[562|562 AD]]
* [[622|622 AD]]
* [[682|682 AD]]
* [[742|742 AD]]
* [[802|802 AD]]
* [[862|862 AD]]
* [[922|922 AD]]
* [[982|982 AD]]
|
* [[1042|1042 AD]]
* [[1102|1102 AD]]
* [[1162|1162 AD]]
* [[1222|1222 AD]]
* [[1282|1282 AD]]
* [[1342|1342 AD]]
* [[1402|1402 AD]]
* [[1462|1462 AD]]
* [[1522|1522 AD]]
* [[1582|1582 AD]]
* [[1642|1642 AD]]
* [[1702|1702 AD]]
* [[1762|1762 AD]]
* [[1822|1822 AD]]
* [[1882|1882 AD]]
* [[1942|1942 AD]]
|
* [[2002|2002 AD]]
* [[2062 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2122 AD]]
* [[22nd century|2182 AD]]
* [[23rd century|2242 AD]]
* [[24th century|2302 AD]]
* [[24th century|2362 AD]]
* [[2422 AD]]
* [[2482 AD]]
* [[2542 AD]]
* [[2602 AD]]
* [[2662 AD]]
* [[2722 AD]]
* [[2782 AD]]
* [[2842 AD]]
* [[2902 AD]]
* [[2962 AD]]
|}

=== Events ===
* In [[Tenshō (Momoyama period)|Tenshō Era]] 10th Year (1582 AD) – the [[Tenshō-Jingo war]].
* In [[Meiji era]] 15th Year (1882 AD) – the [[Imo Incident]] (also known as the Ren-Go Military Rebellion).

==Months of Yang Water Horse==
In a [[Common Era]] year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (i.e. when the [[Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]] are [[Kanoe (庚)]] or [[Kinoto (乙)]]), the month of [[May]] becomes the [[Month|Month (Calendar)]] of Ren-Go. However, here the term “month” may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] or to a seasonal month (from [[Mangzhong]] until the day before [[Xiaoshu]]) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Water Horse==
The [[Senjitsu]] for a Ren-Go day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Ren-Go day is the 5th day of [[Tsuchi (Japanese term)|Shōdo]].
== See Also ==
==See Also==

{{wikidata link|Q1062004}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
